commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f8d2cc9d05284c1b56c15dea06b5cfa36c95089a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR expands tilde-prefixed configured extra memory paths in memory-host-sdk before absolute/workspace resolution, adds unit coverage for `~` and `~/...`, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction: current main treats `~/...` as non-absolute and resolves it under the workspace. The PR regression is also source-reproducible by comparing the new `homedir()` helper with the existing QMD `resolveUserPath()` path under `OPENCLAW_HOME`.
commands.review_followup: This needs PR author or maintainer handling because the fix is concrete but the PR also needs real behavior proof, so ClawSweeper should not queue an automated repair marker from this review.

target.title: fix(memory): expand home paths in extra memory paths
target.body:
Summary:
- expand home-relative extra memory paths before absolute/workspace resolution
- cover bare `~` and `~/...` normalization in the memory host SDK tests
- add changelog credit for the reported paper cut

Verification:
- `pnpm test packages/memory-host-sdk/src/host/internal.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

Behavior addressed:
`normalizeExtraMemoryPaths()` treated `~/...` as a relative workspace path, so configured extra memory folders under the user's home directory were scanned from the project instead of the home directory.

Real environment tested:
Local macOS checkout with the repo test wrapper.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
`pnpm test packages/memory-host-sdk/src/host/internal.test.ts`

Evidence after fix:
The normalizer test now asserts `~/shared-notes` resolves to `path.join(os.homedir(), "shared-notes")` and bare `~` resolves to `os.homedir()`.

Observed result after fix:
1 Vitest file passed, 8 tests passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

What was not tested:
A live memory reindex against a real home-directory vault; the touched behavior is isolated to path normalization and covered directly.

Fixes #58026.
target.author: steipete
